neighborhoods.name: Frederick Road historic district
neighborhoods.description: Walkable historic Main Street strip along Frederick Road with the Catonsville Community Library, restaurants, and music venues, adjacent to UMBC

housing.predominantType: Historic homes, modest townhomes, and small apartments

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Catonsville. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Old Catonsville / Paradise
neighborhoods.description: Tree-lined residential streets with Victorian and early-1900s housing stock and mature landscaping
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Catonsville's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Catonsville Crossing / Rolling Road
neighborhoods.description: Apartment and townhome corridor along Rolling Road and Edmondson Avenue with bus access to downtown Baltimore
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Oella
neighborhoods.description: Historic mill village along the Patapsco River with the Trolley Trail, Patapsco Valley State Park access, and converted mill loft housing

housing.predominantType: Mill workers' cottages and converted-mill lofts

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.
